name: Hawaiian Airlines

carryOn.notes: One carry-on bag and one personal item included for all passengers.

economy.notes: $30 first bag for mainland-Hawaii routes. Free for inter-island.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Max 100Wh per battery. 101–160Wh with airline approval.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Hawaiian Airlines include free checked bags?
faqs.answer: For inter-island flights, checked bags may be included. For mainland-Hawaii routes, first checked bag costs $30 for economy. Premium cabin passengers receive complimentary checked bags.

faqs.question: What is Hawaiian Airlines' carry-on size limit?
faqs.answer: Carry-on bags must be 22 x 14 x 9 inches and weigh 25 lbs or less.
